text:
Created attachment 245324
patch v1

Hi,

I have an update for composer2. Tested it as usual and using it locally.

This update contains a security update: https://github.com/composer/composer/security/advisories/GHSA-jm6m-4632-36hf

BTW also composer 1.x should be updated, but I don't have an update patch for it, could you provide one?

Thanks!
